GitConfig.description:
Configuration for git domain operations and conventional commit behavior.

Controls features like scope selection, breaking change detection, and commit
message body generation for AI-powered git commits.

enable_scopes.description: Enable scope selection for conventional commits
enable_scopes.title: Enable Scopes

enable_breaking_changes.description: Enable breaking change detection and confirmation
enable_breaking_changes.title: Enable Breaking Changes

max_description_length.description: Maximum character length for commit descriptions
max_description_length.title: Max Description Length
